category_sources: Official repository/package metadata for naga-cli describes it as a CLI for the Naga shader translator and validator.
source_facts.description says shader translation command-line tool.
docs_sources: The adjacent official Naga source tree documents the shader translation project; no separate dedicated docs site was found.
naga-cli is maintained in the official gfx-rs/wgpu monorepo under naga-cli.
repo_sources: The former gfx-rs/naga repository states development moved into the wgpu repository.
source_facts.repo is empty; official crate metadata/search result points to https://github.com/gfx-rs/wgpu/tree/trunk/naga-cli.
tags_sources: Official repository metadata identifies Naga as a shader translator/validator in Rust.
source_facts.description identifies shader translation CLI functionality.
